It’s an anti-aging cheat code:

- Natural, non-irritant retinol alternative
- Reduces fine lines
- Boosts collagen + glow

100% natural: Bakuchiol + cold-pressed oils. That’s it. Glass shaker bottle like father’s aftershave bottle.

AI won't take your engineering job. but a dev who knows how to use AI better than you will.

This quote is becoming true now.

If you run a $5M-$50M business and you're evaluating AI vendors, here's the one question that filters 80% of them out:

"Show me the dashboard I'll use to tell if this is working in 30 days."

Real vendors have an answer. They'll show you throughput numbers, error rates, cost per

"AI strategy" at a 30-person company should be a sticky note, not a slide deck.

Three questions:

— Which task eats 10+ hours a week?
— Are the inputs structured enough to trust?
— Can you define "done" in one sentence?

Three yeses and you have your project. Everything else is

A trucking dispatcher was printing 40 service orders a day, scanning them, emailing them, then re-keying the same data into their TMS.

Replaced the loop with a 60-line script and one shared Drive folder.

90 minutes of daily admin → 4 minutes.

The "AI" never touched a model.
